## Checklist
- [ ] I have followed the Implementation Guide step order
- [ ] New code has unit tests
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`pytest tests/unit/`)
- [ ] Ruff lint passes (`ruff check .`)
- [ ] Mypy type check passes (`mypy apps/ services/`)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials committed
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars added
- [ ] Migration created if schema changed (`alembic revision --autogenerate`)
